data.name: Andre
data.title: Fullstack Software Engineer | Scalable & AI-Powered Systems
data.summary: Fullstack Software Engineer specializing in scalable application development and CI/CD, Docker, and Cloud infrastructure operations. I architect, develop, and deploy production-grade applications that bridge the gap between engineering and system reliability. My expertise spans building robust event-driven backend systems, optimizing frontend architectures, and orchestrating entirely automated deployment pipelines with Azure and Kubernetes.

projects.title: TransparAI
projects.purpose: Architected and deployed a transactional AI-driven SaaS platform, orchestrating asynchronous LLM data pipelines for legal domain analysis. Engineered a decoupled, highly available infrastructure integrated with secure Identity & Access Management (IAM) and robust payment orchestration to streamline complex document processing securely.
projects.impact: Streamlined complex legal document processing by decoupling AI analytics from core application logic, ensuring high availability and secure data handling.
projects.role: Systems Architect & Fullstack Engineer. Designed the distributed architecture, integrated Gemini AI, and implemented role-based access control and subscriptions.

projects.title: PlatformPro Jobs
projects.purpose: Designed and engineered a scalable, serverless distributed platform to automate specialized engineering recruitment workflows. Implemented unstructured data processing pipelines leveraging Genkit and Gemini AI for automated candidate CV evaluation, establishing a robust event-driven architecture that eliminated manual screening operations.
projects.impact: Reduced manual screening operations by automating candidate evaluation pipelines, establishing a scalable serverless event-driven workflow.
projects.role: Systems Architect & Fullstack Engineer. Built robust API layers, managed serverless deployments, and optimized database queries for AI-enhanced search.

projects.title: Freemap
projects.purpose: Developed a high-performance Event-Driven Architecture (EDA) handling concurrent geospatial data discovery and real-time communication. Orchestrated low-latency WebSocket event loops and secure multimedia streaming, delivering a responsive, distributed application capable of managing secure, real-time video sessions at scale.
projects.impact: Delivered a highly responsive real-time distributed application capable of managing concurrent geospatial queries and real-time video sessions securely.
projects.role: Backend Engineer & Systems Integrator. Orchestrated Node.js real-time event loops, optimized MongoDB geospatial queries, and managed JWT-based authorization.

projects.title: DigitalSentinel
projects.purpose: Led the architecture and development of an interactive, AI-assisted enterprise onboarding platform leveraging complex, multi-phase state machine workflows. Integrated advanced Identity & Access Management (NextAuth.js) and embedded generative AI logic to centralize security training operations and provide real-time, verifiable tracking.
projects.impact: Centralized security training operations through a governed learning environment with real-time analytics and verifiable progress tracking.
projects.role: Lead Frontend Architect. Structured the gamified learning engine, integrated embedded AI assistance, and built reusable modular UI components.

workExperience.title: IT Operations & Automation Engineer (Apprentice)
workExperience.subtitle: HDI France, Paris
workExperience.description:
• Automation Engineering: Developed advanced batch scripting workflows for XML data import generation, eliminating manual data entry errors and reducing processing time by 70%.
  • IAM & Workflow Digitalization: Architected and digitalized Identity & Access Management (IAM) workflows using SharePoint and Power Automate, streamlining IT access requests for 200+ employees.
  • Release & Patch Management: Managed production environments and executed non-regression testing (ALM Octane) during monthly Patch Management cycles, ensuring seamless business continuity and zero-downtime deployments.
  • IT Service Management (ITSM): Managed N1/N2 application and infrastructure support via ServiceNow and GLPI. Coordinated the complete renewal and deployment of the corporate IT fleet (~200 workstations) while upholding stringent SLAs.
  • Security Governance & RBAC: Restructured Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) models across enterprise applications, standardizing security permissions and significantly reducing unauthorized access incidents.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer Intern
workExperience.subtitle: FedHub, Remote
workExperience.description:
• Data Extraction Pipelines: Engineered and deployed robust ETL and data scraping pipelines (Python, BeautifulSoup) to automate on-demand business intelligence gathering, successfully eliminating hours of manual data processing per week.
  • Frontend & Performance Optimization: Developed a comprehensive UI refactor across a hybrid stack (React, TypeScript, Laravel). Implemented advanced rendering strategies and asset compression to drastically enhance Core Web Vitals and search engine metrics.

education.title: Mastère – Expert en Développement Web Fullstack (Titre RNCP n°39583 — Niveau 7, Bac+5 reconnu par l'État)
education.subtitle: Ynov Campus, Paris
education.description: Five-year integrated programme covering fullstack development, DevOps, cloud infrastructure, and enterprise systems. Coursework: React, Node.js, Next.js, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, AWS, Azure, Software Architecture, Agile/Scrum, AI and Data Science, Application Security.

softSkills: Communication and collaboration with cross-functional teams
